_meta.notes: Book I, Chapter 1 — Strange Omens. The first week of the year. Most player runs are tutorial-shaped; the world is only beginning to tighten.

title: Strange Omens
theme: the cycle stirs after a long silence — small wrongnesses everywhere
worldEvent: the moon comes up wrong-colored over Iron-Reach for one night
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK I, CHAPTER 1: STRANGE OMENS. The cycle is stirring after a long quiet. Reference small wrongnesses if natural — a moon that came up wrong-colored over Iron-Reach last night, water tasting faintly of iron, a draft that wasn't there yesterday. Don't lecture; weave subtly. The Wyrm is not yet visible to most players.
